input.content:
SQL Agent Skill Test – Basic Analytics

Overview
- Created a SQLite database at /_outputs/sql_agent_skill_test.db with the required schema and sample data, then executed two analytics queries to demonstrate skill usage.

Data Model (as implemented)
- customers(customer_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT)
- orders(order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, customer_id INTEGER, total REAL, FOREIGN KEY(customer_id) REFERENCES customers(customer_id))
- order_items(item_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, order_id INTEGER, product TEXT, unit_price REAL, quantity INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(order_id) REFERENCES orders(order_id))

Queries Used
- Q1: Top 3 customers by total spent
  SELECT c.name AS customer, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS total_spent
  FROM customers c
  JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
  JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
  GROUP BY c.name
  ORDER BY total_spent DESC
  LIMIT 3;

- Q2: Most popular product by total sales value
  SELECT oi.product, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS total_sales
  FROM order_items oi
  GROUP BY oi.product
  ORDER BY total_sales DESC
  LIMIT 1;

Results
- Q1 — Top 3 customers by total spent:
  - Alice Smith — 140.0
  - Carol Lee — 100.0
  - Bob Johnson — 40.0

- Q2 — Most popular product by total sales value:
  - Widget — 200.0

Notes
- The results reflect the data provided in the task and are derived directly from the created database.
